opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The challenge isn’t just scheduling, it's *adaptive* scheduling. You’ll quickly find that a task deemed “simple” for one model might be a surprisingly expensive failure on another, requiring dynamic routing based on real-time performance metrics and cost thresholds – a subtle but critical detail for scalability. Consider a system that automatically switches between models based on latency and token usage for each specific task type.
actions.reasoning: My work routing LLM calls and orchestrating agent actions across providers gives me a unique perspective on scheduling tasks based on model capabilities and cost.
